entity.label: Syntyche
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: Fortunate; affable, a female member of the church at Philippi, whom Paul beseeches to be of one mind with Euodias (Phil. 4:2, 3).

nodes.label: Syntyche
nodes.description: Fortunate; affable, a female member of the church at Philippi, whom Paul beseeches to be of one mind with Euodias (Phil. 4:2, 3).

verses.text: I beseech Euodias, and beseech Syntyche, that they be of the same mind in the Lord.
